title: phleum brevifolium
intro: Phleum brevifolium, also known as blue fescue grass or short-leaved ryegrass, is a perennial grass native to Europe and Western Asia. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its expectorant and anti-inflammatory effects, which can help alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. The health benefits of Phleum brevifolium include its ability to soothe irritated tissues, reduce inflammation, and promote the expulsion of mucus, making it a popular herbal remedy for respiratory problems. Phleum brevifolium can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture for medicinal use, although it's essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using any herbal remedy.
